name: Deep Desktop
short_description: Deep Desktop creates a copy of your screen in VR with a 3D depth effect added to any content (Pictures, Video, Games) that is displayed!
detailed_description:
Deep desktop facilitates the usage of the latest monocular depth estimation algorithms to use them on the content of your screen:

  • NEW: Use it also with your video files with the new video player!
  • Automatically install all the requirements for the algorithms to work and avoid a tedious installation process.
  • Run in real time with the content of your screen, no need to go through annoying VR prompts or file explorers to access your content.
  • Move into the scene displayed with the movements button.
  • Allow you to use a second GPU to ease the burden on the one used for the VR headset.

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, German, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Ukrainian, Simplified Chinese
